extraction.one_line_summary: NIBALI Vincenzo attacked on the flat lakeside section with 17km to go, dropped PINOT Thibaut on final climb, won by 28 seconds.
tactical_patterns: NIBALI Vincenzo attacked on flat lakeside road (not climb) with 17km remaining, exploiting chaos from DE PLUS crash.
PINOT Thibaut's team (FDJ) exhausted themselves chasing early, leaving him isolated when NIBALI attacked on flat section.
ALAPHILIPPE Julian bridged alone to the lead group then counter-attacked, showing Quick-Step prioritized him over MARTIN Dan.
FRANK Mathias attacked first, triggering chain reaction that splintered group before NIBALI's decisive flat-road acceleration.

rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: attacked on flat section (not climb) with 17km to go, immediately dropped struggling PINOT on subsequent climb
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: visibly on ragged edge when NIBALI attacked, could barely hold wheel before being dropped on climb
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: bridged to leaders alone then counter-attacked, showing he was protected option over struggling MARTIN Dan
rider_signals.MOSCON Gianni: positive: finished in chase group 28 seconds down, strong result amid 'not uncontroversial circumstances'
rider_signals.DE PLUS Laurens: negative: crashed on dangerous descent before flat section, removed from race with leg damage
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: negative: clearly out of sorts, team pivoted to ALAPHILIPPE as protected rider
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: neutral: reached by NIBALI during attack, became teammate's stepping stone rather than contender
rider_signals.FRANK Mathias: positive: initiated critical attack sequence that splintered group before NIBALI's winning move
